research_notes: This is a research-mapping HYPOTHESIS plan, not an observed Tachibana trade on 300750.SZ.
Q-PRESSURE-ADJUST horizontal matrix permits: 压力调整 / 库存再平衡 / 减仓后加回. We pick pullback_add (add after pullback) as the canonical 'add-back-after-pressure' action.
pm_required=true is REQUIRED here because rhythm_meaning=limited (see _pm_required_from_trial_row in ashare_intake_validator.py).
pm_action=add_on is selected to be coherent with method_action=pullback_add. Alternative human choice: pm_action=rebalance (inventory_rebalance).
method_status=hypothesis: derived by analogy from Tachibana's own 1976-03-A pressure-adjust segment. NO real Tachibana trade on 300750.SZ.
boundary: do_not_treat_addon_size_as_structure_fact (addon size lives in PM, not MALF).
